steps: Go to https://app.storyblok.com/#/me/account and log in or create a free account
Scroll down to the 'Personal access tokens' section
Enter a name for the token (e.g., 'Gateway MCP')
Copy the generated token immediately — it is shown only once
For space-specific tokens: open your space, go to Settings > Access Tokens, select an access level (Public, Preview, or Private), enter a name, and click 'Generate'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Personal Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your Storyblok personal access token (for Management API) or space-level token (for Content Delivery API)

notes: Free tier available with up to 1 space
Personal access tokens grant access to ALL spaces on your account — keep them secret
The Management API uses the personal access token; the Content Delivery API uses per-space tokens
Space-level tokens have three access levels: Public (published), Preview (draft + published), and Private
Token is shown only once at creation time — copy it immediately

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve info about the current space to verify the access token
